script.output: GetRequest: HTTP/1.1 200 OK Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN Feature-Policy: payment 'self' X-Recruiting: /#/jobs Accept-Ranges: bytes Cache-Control: public, max-age=0 Last-Modified: Thu, 12 Mar 2026 21:56:20 GMT ETag: W/"7c3-19ce40cf53c" Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8 Content-Length: 1987 Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Sat, 14 Mar 2026 01:45:57 GMT Connection: close <!-- Copyright (c) 2014-2023 Bjoern Kimminich & the OWASP Juice Shop contributors. finished.summary: Nmap done at Fri Mar 13 21:45:58 2026; 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 11.27 seconds
